prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 13424→16544→16755→69374→25474。2024 年因广西首次新高考专业组划分出现断档（69374），2025 年已大幅回升至 25474，但仍高于 2023 年约 8700 名，显示近年整体竞争加剧、位次后移趋势；2025 年基准约 25474 名；该校在广西理科组计划 2021–2025 年分别为 140、140、138、128、136 人；2025 年较 2024 年扩招 8 人（+6.25%），但 2026 年招生计划文件缺失，无法确认最新变化，暂按持平处理。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 45 名，近年排名稳定在 42–47 区间，属中上水平 211；2026 年声誉评价未收录该校；抖音热度排名第 54（较热），综合热度 564132，主要视频内容为毕业巡游及学术诚信事件，整体关注度一般；无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 5 个：兽医学 A+、畜牧学 A+、水产 A、作物学 A、食品科学与工程 A，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热，可能分流部分理科高分考生；本省 2026 年考生总数约 39.2 万，按近年比例估算物理类约 26.9 万人（较 2025 年增加约 3.3%），竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年本省考生增加约 3.3% 以及 2025 年计划小幅扩招的抵消作用，在 2025 年基准 25474 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 25774 名，区间 25274–26274 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 13424 → 16544 → 16755 → 69374 → 25474. In 2024, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination major group division, there was a gap (69374), which rebounded significantly to 25474 in 2025, but still about 8700 places higher than 2023, indicating intensified competition and a backward trend in recent years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 25474. The university's enrollment plan for science groups in Guangxi from 2021 to 2025 was 140, 140, 138, 128, and 136 students respectively; in 2025, it expanded by 8 students (+6.25%) compared to 2024, but the 2026 enrollment plan document is missing, so the latest changes cannot be confirmed, and it is temporarily treated as unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 42–47 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation did not include this university; Douyin popularity ranking 54th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat index of 564132, main video content includes graduation parade and academic integrity incidents, overall attention is average; no record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 5 disciplines rated A- or above: Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Aquaculture A, Crop Science A, Food Science and Engineering A, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, potentially diverting some high-scoring science students; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated physics category of about 269,000 based on recent proportions (an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the increase of about 3.3% in provincial examinees in 2026, and the offsetting effect of the slight enrollment expansion in 2025, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 25474; the predicted minimum ranking is about 25774, with a range of 25274–26274.
